hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".file_path // .path // empty" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -qvE "(docs/|CLAUDE\.md|/discovery/)" && echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(cs|ts|html)$"; then echo "{\"message\": \"Source file changed: $FILE -- consider running /update-docs if this affects documented features\"}" ; fi'
